steps.title: Follow the similarity
steps.content: The first artist incorporated Inuit throat singing into electronic music. Similarly signals that Claire Waban combined powwow music with folk-rock in the same kind of way.

steps.title: Choose combined styles
steps.content: A suggests disorder, B means one style replaced another, and C means analyzed similarities rather than created music. The word for smoothly combining musical styles fits the context. The answer is D.
